name: corydalis yanhusuo
title: best benefits of corydalis yanhusuo
description: Corydalis yanhusuo improves sleep by enhancing the quality and duration of nighttime rest, resulting in individuals feeling refreshed and rejuvenated in the morning. This benefit is crucial as it plays a significant role in maintaining physical and mental health, with poor sleep quality being linked to various issues such as fatigue, decreased cognitive function, and increased risk of chronic diseases like diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
